name: Lili Stoyanova
intro: Experienced Software Developer with a background in Salesforce (Apex, LWC, Sales Cloud, Service Cloud), Salesforce Commerce Cloud (Demandware), Java, and JavaScript. Adept at building and maintaining web applications, integrating systems, and translating business needs into working code. Proven ability to contribute effectively in remote, international team environments. Focused on writing clear, reliable, and maintainable software.
